description: Temporary, exact-match exceptions for legacy architecture-compliance debt. New package naming or banned-library violations must not be added without an owner, reason, and removal date.

exceptions.reason: Legacy YAPPC workspace root package; active migration to @yappc/* needs coordinated workspace/package-filter updates.
Deprecated IDE package still published internally while consumers migrate to canvas-owned replacements.
Legacy YAPPC app package name; rename requires coordinated filter/script updates.
Legacy YAPPC web package name; rename requires coordinated filter/script updates.
Legacy YAPPC docs package name; rename requires coordinated docs-site deployment updates.
Legacy local ESLint config name; rename requires coordinated consumer config updates.
Legacy shared tsconfig package name; rename requires coordinated extends references.
Legacy Vite plugin package name; rename requires coordinated plugin imports and docs.
Legacy YAPPC HTTP clients still use Axios interceptors; migration must move to fetch/@ghatana/http-client with retry/error parity.
Legacy React Native Guardian API client uses Axios; migration must preserve auth/header/error semantics.
Legacy mobile package carries Axios while shared mobile API client migrates.
Legacy mobile package carries Axios while shared mobile API client migrates.
Shared mobile API client still uses Axios interceptors; migration must preserve AsyncStorage auth behavior.
Legacy content explorer dependency declaration; remove after verifying no transitive local API-client usage remains.
